feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: F5987 does not show billing plan for monthly billing item
entry.content:
Hello,

When working with new version of FIORI app Manage Sales Contract 2, I miss contract data on the Header and Item, I'm not able to specify neither installation nor acceptance date. I got error saying that FIORI app does not work with contract data. When I disable this setup, I can save my contract, but the billing  plan is not visible in the FIORI app. Could you please explain why these 2 functionalities are not supported? Do you know if and when we can expect them to be available in FIORI:

  • contract data on header/item
  • periodic billing plan

/Tomasz

entry.title: Statutory Reporting France Italy
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

does somebody know how to create the following french and italian financial reports in S/4HANA Finance Private Cloud?

Libro Giornale

Libro Mastro

Livre Journal Detail

Grand Livre 

Thank you very much in advance

entry.title: Employee role(BUP003) in BP is not showing in dropdown
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am unable to find BUP003 Employee Role in the dropdown when I try to create a BP.

After reading technical material, I have done:

1. SM30: T77S0 Table

2. Activation Switch for Functions of BP

3. Define Number Ranges for BP

4. Define Groupings and Assign Number Ranges

5. Define Account Groups and Field Selection (Supplier)

6. Define Number Ranges for Supplier Master Records

7. Set BP Role Category for Direction BP to Vendor

8. Define Number Assignment for Direction BP to Vendor

9. Define Reconciliation Accounts for Employees in Role FI Supplier

10. Define Default Vendor Data for Employees in Role FI Supplier

11. SE38: /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE

12. SLG1: Got the message "Pernr 00000003 successfully synched into Business Partner."

But I still haven't found the BUP003 in dropdown when do BP again. Does anyone know which of the steps I missed or did wrong in the above steps?

Thanks 

Vincent

entry.title: Error Message FZ 376 : Error in withholding tax calculation S/4HANA
entry.content:
HI Everyone,

We have WHT activated. The WHT will be calculated at the time of Invoice posting. I posted some vendor invoices, the WHT got calculated. Now I want to pay the vendor using F110. When I do my proposal I get this Error.

"Message FZ376 - Error in withholding tax calculation". I am not sure why the program is giving such an error.

I found some SAP Notes related to version 4.6, but I would like to know if there are any correction notes applicable to S/4HANA for this issue.

Could anyone help me with this?

Regards,

FG

entry.title: S/4 HANA migration from ECC on HANA DB
entry.content:
Dear Gurus.

When perfroming mirgation from SAP ERP ( ECC) running on HANADB to S/4 HANA, SUM should not use R3load for migration to HANA from non-HANA DB, cause source DB is already HANA . Is it correct?

Regards

Vladimir

entry.title: SAP S/4 Migration
entry.content: S/4 Migration Project – insight into running parallel S/4 projects and how that impacts SAP landscapes and processes to ensure alignment and retrofit in a possible (N+2) scenario would be helpful.

entry.title: How to Enable OAuth for OData APIs in SAP S/4HANA 2023 Trial Appliance?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently evaluating SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 using the Fully-Activated Trial Appliance (deployed via SAP CAL). The appliance stack includes:

  • SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01

  • SAP HANA DB 2.0

  • Accessed via Windows Remote Desktop

  • SAP GUI version: SAP Logon 64-bit

As part of this evaluation, I want to explore securing OData APIs using OAuth 2.0. My goal is to understand how to enable and test OAuth-protected access to standard OData APIs such as API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.

What I’ve Done So Far:

  • Logged into the system using BPINST, client 100 via SAP GUI.

  • Attempted to access the transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE to activate or check services.

  • However, executing /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE does not open anything, and I suspect this could be due to missing authorizations or incorrect user context.

  • I am also unsure which user or role is required to configure OAuth client setup (e.g., via /n/IWFND/OAUTH2_CLIENT_* transactions).

Request:

  • What is the correct user or role to use for configuring OAuth 2.0 for OData APIs in this trial setup?

  • How can I access the SAP Gateway Service Maintenance (/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE) screen if it doesn't open via BPINST?

  • Are there any additional steps or prerequisites required in the trial appliance to enable OAuth functionality for OData APIs?

Any guidance, especially specific to this trial environment, would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Generating Billing Document Request from Service Contract
entry.content:
I’m using SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Edition and currently working on generating a Billing Document Request (BDR) from a service contract. When the contract contains only one line item, the system creates a single BDR as expected. However, when I include multiple line items in the service contract—even if all of them share the same billing date—the system generates separate BDRs for each line item. My requirement is to generate a single BDR that includes all line items corresponding to that billing date. Could someone please guide me on how to achieve this?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to replicate documents from BTP DMS Production to Test Tenants
entry.content:
Dear

My customer is currently utilizing SAP BTP Document Management Service (DMS) with the DMS Integration Option to manage and store documents in thier ERP systems.

They would like to inquire about the available options for replicating documents that are stored in their BTP DMS Production tenant into their Test tenant.

Specifically, They would like to understand:

  • Is there a standard method or tool provided by SAP for copying or replicating documents between BTP DMS tenants (Production → Test)? Is it better to approach this task from the ERP side or the BTP side?

  • If so, could you please provide guidance or best practices for performing this replication securely and efficiently?

  • Are there any specific prerequisites or limitations we should be aware of?

BR, Jungwoo

entry.title: s4 Hanna to SAC system job schedule issue
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Designed Model based on s/4 Hanna ,in SAC system we schedule job Runs every month and   running query in backend (s/4 Hanna )  data fetch periodic ex:  jan to Aug-25

Now our requirement is   dynamically it should change month from backend and fetch data to SAC 

EX: 1 Jan 25 to 31Jan 25

again next run  1Feb 25 to 28 Feb-25

Thanks,

Raghunath

 

can some one guide on same 

 

 

dyanamic   bacground period  to period  

 

every month how to 

dynamic

entry.title: INCLUDE TYPE not available on S/4 HANA?
entry.content:
I am trying to extend SAPs service consumption models to include navigations in my partner namespace structures. It seems 'INCLUDE TYPE is no longer recognized syntax in S/4 HANA 2023.

After using 'INCLUDE TYPE', a structure literally called 'include' that needs to be referenced as "ls_struct-include-field_name" is created.  

I have imported various API Hub edmx files as service consumption models to create my initial classes. Is there a work around to not having access to the old 'INCLUDE TYPE / INCLUDE STRUCTURE' in recent versions of ABAP cloud?

 

TYPES:
      BEGIN OF tys_product_type,
        product TYPE c LENGTH 40,
        etag TYPE string,
      END OF tys_product_type.

TYPES:
     BEGIN OF tys_extended_product_type,
        product_description        TYPE tyt_product_description_type,
        product_ewmwarehouse       TYPE tyt_product_ewmwarehouse_type,
        INCLUDE TYPE tys_product_type,
     END OF tys_extended_product_type.

----
"Usage
ls_entity_key TYPE tys_extended_product_type
ls_entity_key = VALUE #( include-product  = zif_api_hub~mv_doc_num ).

entry.title: Update permitted usages - 3 Tier extensibility model
entry.content:
In our S/4 HANA 2023 FPS02 system, INHERITING FROM /iwbep/cl_v4_abs_pm_model_prov is not permitted in tier 1 (ABAP version ABAP CLOUD).

Following SAPs guide on using client proxys in on-premise systems, All of our consumption models for client proxy inherit from this interface. Therefore, all our client proxy classes need to be put into a Tier 2 software component. 

I can see that in BTP ABAP systems, usage of /iwbep/cl_v4_abs_pm_model_prov is allowed. 

So, how do we update our on-premise system to get new permissions on what objects are allowed for use without moving usage into Tier 2 wrappers?

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Hi All, We have scheduled a job with custom report and the runtime was around 40K seconds.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have scheduled a job with custom report and the runtime was around 40K seconds. How can I get the  root cause for longer runtime of the job that was executed few days back. I have check in the job log, but there's no detailed information. Also checked ST03N and couldn't get much information about the root cause. I understand that trace ST05 should be enabled, but its a production system. Is there any other way to find the reason for longer runtime of the job (report is custom - Zreport and assigned with variant). 

Appreciate if anyone help with their inputs.

entry.title: Run Foreign Trade Regulations Z4
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone help here?

Application: Run Foreign Trade Regulations Z4.

The customer pulls an XML file from the SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, but it contains missing data and cannot be sent to the Federal Office.

Description of the problem:
Data is missing that was actually created in customising for the company codes.

The following data is missing and is not contained in the XML file:
Economic sector
Company address
Telephone number
Contact person
E-mail address
Company number
---> although this data is set in customising (foreign trade and balance of payments). (see screen1 and 2)

In addition, the XML structure does not contain a field for the commodity code.
Is there a way to insert a commodity code field in this XML file structure? If so, how?

Many thanks in advance.

Yours sincerely
N.S.

entry.title: Direct URL to open PO in SAP
entry.content:
Direct URL to open PO in SAP

We need to have a URL to display the PO number in ME23N by passing the PO number in URL.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE GI for Reservation (261) Mat Doc is created but withdrawn quantity is 0
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

When using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE Goods Issue for Reservation (261) Material Document is created but Withdrawn Quantity is 0. It happens only sporadically. The quantity is available in stock.

entry.title: SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 patch 15 - URGENT REQUIRMENT
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are in a situation with our SAP HANA update 1909. We are stuck with upgrade and there is no forward path due to the fact we are using SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 patch 14 which is not compatible with 2023 S4HANA and the product is no more supported by SAP. The patch 15 of SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 is compatible with SAP HANA 2023 but there is no way we can get the patch for this product. SAP or SalesForce both do not have the patch 15 and we are literally stuck. We are not able to uninstall this product and CLICK is heavily used by us and we have 2500 field user using it. We understood we need to look into other product like SAP FSM but for us to move forward with S4 HANA 2023 update we need patch 15 of SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3.

Does anyone has patch 15 of this product SAP WS&O BY CLICKSOFTWARE 2.3 and if you can find or know someone who can give use the patch 15.

This is urgent and need help.

Regards and thank you.

Arun Ghewarchand

entry.title: SICF service insert default port
entry.content:
Hi,

SICF service is picking up http port as default and we would like to change this to https port.
Can you please advice us how this can be achieved?

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA for HCM - Functions Not available in payroll schema
entry.content:
Hello,
in the notes on S/4HANA for HCM it is described that function P0083 is no longer available in the payroll schema.
if function P0083 is still available, payroll is canceled.
The same happens if function P2005 is still active in schema TC00. Function CHECk ABR is also omitted, but a warning is issued here.
It would be great if the omission of the functions P2005 and CHECK ABR were just as prominent as P0083 in the corresponding note.

Valeska Böger

entry.title: Vshere8
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Could you please confirm whether SAP S/4HANA is currently supported on VMware vSphere 8? I am trying to verify compatibility and would appreciate any official documentation or confirmation you can provide.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.
